List currency from customers where segment is one of SME, LAM, KAM.
List consumption from yearmonth records linked to customers where customers currency is one of CZK, EUR.
queries.sql: SELECT "yearmonth"."consumption" FROM "customers" JOIN "yearmonth" ON "customers"."customer_id" = "yearmonth"."customer_id" WHERE "customers"."currency" IN ('CZK', 'EUR');

queries.question: List consumption from yearmonth records linked to customers where customers segment is one of SME, LAM, KAM.
queries.sql: SELECT "yearmonth"."consumption" FROM "customers" JOIN "yearmonth" ON "customers"."customer_id" = "yearmonth"."customer_id" WHERE "customers"."segment" IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM');

queries.question: List time from transactions_1k records linked to gasstations where gasstations segment is one of Premium, Value for money.

queries.question: List time from transactions_1k records optionally linked to gasstations where transactions_1k time is not null.

queries.question: List time from transactions_1k records full-joined with gasstations, products, customers, yearmonth using a row-id selector.
List time and customer id from transactions_1k records full-joined with gasstations, products, customers, yearmonth using a row-id selector.
List time from transactions_1k records full-joined with gasstations, products, customers, yearmonth using a row-id selector.
queries.sql: SELECT "transactions_1k"."time" FROM "transactions_1k" FULL OUTER JOIN "gasstations" ON "transactions_1k"."gas_station_id" = "gasstations"."gas_station_id" FULL OUTER JOIN "products" ON "transactions_1k"."product_id" = "products"."product_id" FULL OUTER JOIN "customers" ON "transactions_1k"."customer_id" = "customers"."customer_id" FULL OUTER JOIN "yearmonth" ON "customers"."customer_id" = "yearmonth"."customer_id" WHERE ("transactions_1k"."row_id" NOT IN (270, 360, 217, 487, 54, 377) OR "transactions_1k"."row_id" IS NULL) AND ("gasstations"."row_id" NOT IN (34, 83, 202, 444, 408, 381) OR "gasstations"."row_id" IS NULL) AND ("products"."row_id" NOT IN (25, 90, 331, 338, 362, 428) OR "products"."row_id" IS NULL) AND ("customers"."row_id" NOT IN (104, 178, 149, 216, 195) OR "customers"."row_id" IS NULL) AND ("yearmonth"."row_id" NOT IN (192, 4, 79, 345, 260) OR "yearmonth"."row_id" IS NULL);

queries.question: List time and customer id from transactions_1k records full-joined with gasstations, products, customers, yearmonth using a row-id selector.
queries.sql: SELECT "transactions_1k"."time", "transactions_1k"."customer_id" FROM "transactions_1k" FULL OUTER JOIN "gasstations" ON "transactions_1k"."gas_station_id" = "gasstations"."gas_station_id" FULL OUTER JOIN "products" ON "transactions_1k"."product_id" = "products"."product_id" FULL OUTER JOIN "customers" ON "transactions_1k"."customer_id" = "customers"."customer_id" FULL OUTER JOIN "yearmonth" ON "customers"."customer_id" = "yearmonth"."customer_id" WHERE ("transactions_1k"."row_id" NOT IN (270, 360, 217, 487, 54, 377) OR "transactions_1k"."row_id" IS NULL) AND ("gasstations"."row_id" NOT IN (34, 83, 202, 444, 408, 381) OR "gasstations"."row_id" IS NULL) AND ("products"."row_id" NOT IN (25, 90, 331, 338, 362, 428) OR "products"."row_id" IS NULL) AND ("customers"."row_id" NOT IN (104, 178, 149, 216, 195) OR "customers"."row_id" IS NULL) AND ("yearmonth"."row_id" NOT IN (192, 4, 79, 345, 260) OR "yearmonth"."row_id" IS NULL);

queries.question: List time from transactions_1k records full-joined with gasstations, products, customers, yearmonth.
queries.sql: SELECT "transactions_1k"."time" FROM "transactions_1k" FULL OUTER JOIN "gasstations" ON "transactions_1k"."gas_station_id" = "gasstations"."gas_station_id" FULL OUTER JOIN "products" ON "transactions_1k"."product_id" = "products"."product_id" FULL OUTER JOIN "customers" ON "transactions_1k"."customer_id" = "customers"."customer_id" FULL OUTER JOIN "yearmonth" ON "customers"."customer_id" = "yearmonth"."customer_id";

queries.question: List time and customer id from transactions_1k records full-joined with gasstations, products, customers, yearmonth.
queries.sql: SELECT "transactions_1k"."time", "transactions_1k"."customer_id" FROM "transactions_1k" FULL OUTER JOIN "gasstations" ON "transactions_1k"."gas_station_id" = "gasstations"."gas_station_id" FULL OUTER JOIN "products" ON "transactions_1k"."product_id" = "products"."product_id" FULL OUTER JOIN "customers" ON "transactions_1k"."customer_id" = "customers"."customer_id" FULL OUTER JOIN "yearmonth" ON "customers"."customer_id" = "yearmonth"."customer_id";
